title: The little things that made you laugh in 3010
display_title: The little things that made you laugh in 3010
wikitext:
[]: The little things that made you laugh in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Jurrasic » Sat Aug 14, 2021 8:00 pm For me, 3 in particular stand out. The first being how the Mk4444 units literally "goose-step" into Paris the same way the Nazis did after the surrender of France in World War 2. The second being the way the Black Moon just casually bulldozes Mount Fuji on it's way to Calvary Base. It wasn't enough to completely upstage one of the most famous symbols of Japan, equivalent to the Statue of Liberty for America by just completely dwarfing it in scale at the end of 3.33, NEWP! Lets drag it along and slowly grind it to rubble all across Japan! Third is a minor one, but Rei's embarassment at wearing her classic dress from NGE was a cute callback that really made me chuckle. How about you peeps? Any moments stand out personally as amusing for you?

[]: Re: The little things that made you laugh in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sat Aug 14, 2021 8:04 pm Toji talking in his sleep made me laugh more than it should have.

[]: Re: The little things that made you laugh in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Jayfive » Sat Aug 14, 2021 8:32 pm I know the opening sequence has been around for ages now but Maya being like "Sit yo ass down" to Midori and it *instantly* cutting to her doing just that is still funny. The hilariously unnecessary full naked fanservice shot of Mari when they are suiting up. Hikari going "sssshhhh" to the misbehaving boys when the booze arrives. You can take the class rep out of school... Rei-Q hanging out with the Ghibli Grannies. Asuka tazing Shinji square in the face. Gendo rising up in the the air gives me flashbacks to those Schick adverts

[]: Re: The little things that made you laugh in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Gendo's Glasses » Sat Aug 14, 2021 8:32 pm Asuka abruptly tasering Shinji. Gendo performing deeds.

[]: Re: The little things that made you laugh in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by DantesInferno » Sat Aug 14, 2021 8:41 pm Jayfive wrote: Asuka tazing Shinji square in the face.

[]: Re: The little things that made you laugh in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Jayfive » Sat Aug 14, 2021 9:02 pm Oh and Mari's right-the-balls-out-of-nowhere Engrish "by da weeeeey" when she asks Asuka about seeing Shinij.

[]: Re: The little things that made you laugh in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by John » Sat Aug 14, 2021 9:25 pm Unintentional but Mari's weird stare while she almost fanwanks the whole Gaius explanation cracks me up. Case in point: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: The little things that made you laugh in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Lennik » Sat Aug 14, 2021 9:32 pm I really enjoyed the Gilligan Cut from Gendo telling Shinji to hand over Eva 01 if he ever wants to see his mother again, to Eva 01's docking station pulling away as Shinji starts it up. Gendo's deadpan "This is why I dislike children" made me laugh. Gendo's Glasses wrote: Gendo performing deeds.

[]: Re: The little things that made you laugh in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Sat Aug 14, 2021 10:45 pm I loved the "imaginary" fight between Shinji and Gendo taking place in different iconic locations. If anything, I wished they went farther with it. Shinji and Gendo fighting in the aquarium! Shinji and Gendo fighting on top of a full-sized Eva's helmet while that Eva fights an Angel! I also thought Shinji colliding into the "sky wall" was a great reference to all the walls Toho has turned into skies

[]: Re: The little things that made you laugh in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Lennik » Sat Aug 14, 2021 10:49 pm Warren Peace wrote: I also thought Shinji colliding into the "sky wall" was a great reference to all the walls Toho has turned into skies

[]: Re: The little things that made you laugh in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Natalie the Cat » Sat Aug 14, 2021 10:50 pm Two things stuck out at me the most: Rei's goofy granny outfit and Gendo scooping up a bit of brain and putting it back in his head.

[]: Re: The little things that made you laugh in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Sat Aug 14, 2021 10:55 pm I laughed in a decent number of occasions. The highlights are: Asuka tasing Shinji, Ayanami going to the library and Gendo casually responding to Ritsuko's shot.

[]: Re: The little things that made you laugh in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Sun Aug 15, 2021 12:11 am Lennik wrote: Warren Peace#928540 wrote: I also thought Shinji colliding into the "sky wall" was a great reference to all the walls Toho has turned into skies

[]: Re: The little things that made you laugh in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Natalie the Cat » Sun Aug 15, 2021 1:09 am Gendo: I am as far beyond bullets as they are beyond you. Risuko: What? Gendo: What?

[]: Re: The little things that made you laugh in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Jayfive » Sun Aug 15, 2021 8:13 am Thought of another one - the harmonica solo towards the end of "Voyager". It sounds great but it sounds like Shirō Sagisu suddenly decided he was composing the end credits music for an 80s sitcom.

[]: Re: The little things that made you laugh in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by unitM » Sun Aug 15, 2021 8:16 am Shinji getting hit with the wave and smiling at the end got me. We've never really had a beach episode in Eva and seeing that "regular" thing happen was kind of cute. Toji sleep talking too.

[]: Re: The little things that made you laugh in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Sun Aug 15, 2021 8:32 am For some reason I thought it was funny about Gendo taking a piece of his brain and putting it back in his head. I also thought the slap that Sakura gives Shinji and Asuka's comment about it afterwards was funny.

[]: Re: The little things that made you laugh in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Aug 15, 2021 9:19 am Rei Q cupping her boobs when watching Tsubame breastfeed takes gold for me, with one of the village grannies commenting "You should marry my son" to Rei Q when she puts on the old middle school outfit coming in with a silver. The scene where Sakura slaps Shinji and Asuka dryly remarks, "Are you his wife now?" takes bronze. An honorable mention goes to any time Mari says something in another language.

[]: Re: The little things that made you laugh in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Ray » Sun Aug 15, 2021 12:05 pm Jayfive wrote: Asuka tazing Shinji square in the face.

[]: Re: The little things that made you laugh in 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Konja7 » Sun Aug 15, 2021 12:17 pm Ray wrote: Funny yes. But easily Asuka at her most petty. But aside from that there wasn't really that much comedy in this movie when compared to the first two or even the one moment in 3.33.
